programme.title: Elsbeth
programme.desc: Elsbeth organizes a book club to investigate a celebrated novelist who may have written the perfect crime.

programme.title: The Mindy Project
programme.desc: Danny offers to let Mindy buy the other condo he owns in his building, but becomes jealous when she starts dating Charlie (Tim Daly); Peter thinks the brain surgeon (Tracey Wigfield) he is dating may be too mature for him.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Mindy Project
programme.desc: When Mindy reads a description of an encounter a man had with her in New York, she thinks she has found her dream guy, which leads to a surprising reveal.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Murphy feels overwhelmed by the chaos and noise in the emergency room; Dr. Reznick struggles to keep her patients alive; Dr. Lim fights for her life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the quarantine, the staff tries to return to its normal routine; as Dr. Audrey Lim recovers from the virus, she and Dr. Neil Melendez navigate their new relationship; Dr. Shaun Murphy and Dr. Aaron Glassman try to relax.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When the SoHo DMV lands a glossy magazine feature, Barb struggles with feeling overlooked, stirring up old insecurities she thought she'd left behind; Gregg and Vic go head-to-head in a competitive quest to earn their first positive review.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Needing to raise a large sum of money to pay the IRS, Sam and Jay agree to host a high-stakes poker game at the mansion; in an act of generosity, Sass and Pete gift Jay's recliner to the basement ghosts.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Elsbeth
programme.desc: Elsbeth organizes a book club to investigate a celebrated novelist who may have written the perfect crime.

programme.title: Elsbeth
programme.desc: When a Wall Street titan is murdered after giving away his fortune, Elsbeth suspects the victim's twin brother and business partner; the Van Ness case continues to cause trouble for Elsbeth.

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: When the Cloud 9 founder's son makes a surprise visit, the employees struggle to accommodate his bold ideas; Garrett helps Dina navigate a tricky situation with Brian; Jonah and Sandra use social media to investigate some worrying news.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Some inside information leads the Cloud 9 employees to try to make the store seem perfect for one day.

programme.title: The Vows We Keep
programme.desc: An event planner must organize the perfect wedding for her sister in less than a month when she finds out that the Rosewood, a historic inn and beloved wedding venue, is being sold.

programme.title: Wedding Season
programme.desc: Pressured by their parents to find spouses, Asha and Ravi pretend to date during a summer of weddings, only to find themselves falling for each other.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: A Safari Romance
programme.desc: Working on protecting the wildlife in Africa, a biologist teams up with a theme park designer who wants to create an over-the-top safari attraction.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth and Rosemary don't agree about how best to share unsettling news in the town regarding the coal mines, but that's put behind them when Rosemary hears even more shocking news.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Days of our Lives
programme.desc: Jada gives Amy Choi troubling news; Tate, Ari and Holly process their complicated feelings about Sophia; Philip tries to give Gabi advice; Stephanie opens up to Julie; Alex asks Joy to stay in Salem.

programme.sub-title: A Judgy Face and Your Grandma's Drawers

programme.title: Bad Moms
programme.desc: Amy (Mila Kunis) has a great husband, overachieving children, beautiful home and successful career. Unfortunately, she's also overworked, exhausted and ready to snap. Fed up, she joins forces with two other stressed-out mothers (Kristen Bell, Kathryn Hahn) to get away from daily life and conventional responsibilities. As the gals go wild with their newfound freedom, they set themselves up for the ultimate showdown with PTA queen bee Gwendolyn and her clique of seemingly perfect moms.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Stepford Wives
programme.desc: After enduring setbacks in her television career, executive Joanna Eberhart (Nicole Kidman) relocates with her family from New York City to the Connecticut suburb of Stepford. While Joanna's husband, Walter (Matthew Broderick), quickly warms up to their new town, she has a hard time adjusting to Stepford's manicured environs and the overly accommodating attitude of the area women. Soon Joanna begins to suspect that something is not right, and she tries to uncover Stepford's secret.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

Fed up, she joins forces with two other stressed-out mothers (Kristen Bell, Kathryn Hahn) to get away from daily life and conventional responsibilities. As the gals go wild with their newfound freedom, they set themselves up for the ultimate showdown with PTA queen bee Gwendolyn and her clique of seemingly perfect moms.

programme.desc: Sparks fly between an interior designer and a handsome pilot who finds homes for rescue dogs.

programme.title: Road Trip Romance
programme.desc: An escalating series of unfortunate events keeps delaying a young woman's journey to her sister's wedding -- a trip she must now take with her biggest rival from high school.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: With the mine reopening imminent, Gowen decides to take drastic measures to make sure it stays closed; Elizabeth and Lucas struggle to communicate with each other; Lucas gets out of town to clear his head.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Donna, an independent hotelier in the Greek islands, is preparing for her daughter's wedding with the help of two old friends. Meanwhile, Sophie, the spirited bride, has a plan. She secretly invites three men from her mother's past in hope of meeting her real father and having him escort her down the aisle on her big day.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Yours, Mine & Ours
programme.desc: When Coast Guard Adm. Frank Beardsley (Dennis Quaid) decides to move his family of eight children back to his old hometown, he encounters handbag designer Helen North (Rene Russo), an old flame from high school. Immediately, sparks fly between the two, and marriage is proposed. But Frank isn't the only one with kids to worry about -- Helen has a total of 10. Right away, the children have no intention of playing nicely, and together they decide to sabotage their parents' relationship.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
